options.name: -cell
options.description: cell name (wild card) to be made jtag cells

options.name: -group
options.description: cell or hinst name to be made a jtag group cell

options.name: -groupWArea
options.description: <cellName|hinstName> {width height} cell or hinst name to be made a jtag group cell with bounding box width and height

options.name: -hinst
options.description: hinst name to be made jtag cell

options.name: -inst
options.description: inst name (wild card) to be made jtag cell

options.name: -instGroup
options.description: instGroup name to be made jtag cell
